name: fiber-arts-content
description: Crochet project documentation and Instagram content creation for @pavi.spins.yarns (Spinning Yarns). Transcribes patterns from video/web sources, formats as standard crochet patterns (PDF), stores in Notion and organized crochet/ folder, tracks active projects (waistband, offset cardigan, landscape blanket), and drafts Instagram posts blending narration identity with fiber arts. Advanced crochet and Tunisian crochet practitioner context.
author: Pavitas Productions
